description: Typography properties: font-size, weight, style, family, letter-spacing, word-spacing, text-indent, text-transform, text-decoration, line-height
visual_assertions: Heading text (h1, h2) should be larger than body paragraph text
Serif font (Times-Roman or similar) should be used for body text
Monospace font (Courier or similar) should be used for .mono class text
Sans-serif font (Helvetica or similar) should be used for .sans class text
Bold weight text should appear visually heavier than normal weight text
Italic text should use an oblique or italic font variant
Letter-spacing: 4px text should have visible gaps between characters compared to normal text
Letter-spacing: -1px text should appear tighter than normal
The .indent paragraph should have its first line indented by approximately 40px
.uppercase text should appear in ALL CAPS
.lowercase text should appear in all lowercase
.capitalize text should have each word starting with a capital letter
.underline text should have a line drawn below it
.line-through text should have a line drawn through the middle
Loose line-height (2.5) paragraphs should have more vertical space between lines than tight (1.0)
